name: THEGLOBE COM INC
summary: theglobe.com, inc. is a shell company with no material operations or assets. Originally founded as an online community with registered members in the United States and abroad, the company sold its last remaining operating business, Tralliance Corporation, in 2008. Since then, it has functioned as a public shell company incurring only customary public company expenses including personnel, accounting, legal, and audit costs.

partnerships.description: Delfin entered into a Common Stock Purchase Agreement in December 2017, acquiring approximately 70.9% of theglobe.com's common stock from certain stockholders.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
